prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A single white abstract mark centered — two flowing curved lines that cross or intertwine, suggesting the letter C but also suggesting two paths of movement meeting. Like a dancer's trace through space captured in a single moment. Calligraphic, organic, hand-drawn energy. White on black only. No text, no words. The mark should feel like it was made in one breath — fluid, intentional, alive.
